recommendation_summary.replace: 13 files — the 11 query-builder files under sqlite-core/effect/ (db, session, select, insert, update, delete, query, raw, count, index) plus the 2 barrel files (index.ts, effect-sqlite/index.ts). These mirror drizzle-orm/sqlite-core internals and need pg-core equivalents
recommendation_summary.abstract: 5 files — effect-sqlite/session.ts, effect-sqlite/driver.ts, effect-sqlite/migrator.ts, internal/drizzle-utils.ts, up-migrations/effect-sqlite.ts, up-migrations/sqlite.ts. These are the adapter layer and migration tooling that should be genericized to support both sqlite and pg backends
